'''Wrigglers''' were an [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibious]] [[Species/Legends|species]] native to [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. The average size was about five [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long and half a meter thick, making them the largest of all known land-based lifeforms on that [[Planet/Legends|world]]. The creatures' cilia could deliver an electrostatic charge that was powerful enough to knock a grown [[Human/Legends|Human]] off his feet. Like other Drongar lifeforms, they were invertebrates.<ref name="MSI" />

They were eaten by the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces stationed on Drongar during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and, seared in [[redfruit]] juice and sprinkled with fried [[Fire gnat/Legends|fire gnat]]s, made a tasty meal, somewhat reminiscent of [[Fleek eel/Legends|fleek eel]].<ref name="MSI" />

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''
